tasks.label: Pandoc → PDF (Eisvogel + Mermaid)
args: pandoc "${fileBasename}" -o "pdf/${fileBasenameNoExtension}.pdf" --template=eisvogel --pdf-engine=xelatex --lua-filter=filters/mermaid.lua; exit_code=$?; if [ -d images/mermaid ]; then find images/mermaid -type f \( -name "*.mmd" -o -name "*.png" -o -name "*.svg" \) -delete; fi; exit $exit_code

tasks.label: Pandoc → PDF (Eisvogel + Mermaid, cache PNG)
args: pandoc "${fileBasename}" -o "pdf/${fileBasenameNoExtension}.pdf" --template=eisvogel --pdf-engine=xelatex --lua-filter=filters/mermaid.lua; exit_code=$?; if [ -d images/mermaid ]; then find images/mermaid -type f \( -name "*.mmd" -o -name "*.png" -o -name "*.svg" \) -delete; fi; exit $exit_code
